calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion To Vacate Disissal And Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation; Declaration Of Jeffrey Mukai
Off Calendar Jan-25-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. Motion To Vacate Disissal And Enter Judgment Pursuant To Stipulation.

Wells Fargo's motion to vacate dismissal and enter judgment is GRANTED. No opposition filed.
Counsel for plaintiff is to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org. Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)
